must_find.description: Clones every AgentEvent before checking the filter condition; should filter on references first, then clone only matching events
compute_stats takes Vec<AgentEvent> by value instead of &[AgentEvent], forcing callers to clone; also clones event_type strings for HashMap keys unnecessarily
Clones all events from all streams into a combined vector; a merge iterator or reference-based sort would avoid N*M clone allocations
Calls .to_vec() on chunk slices, cloning all events per chunk just to iterate; chunk slices are directly iterable without conversion

must_not_flag.description: count_by_type correctly uses references (&str keys) and borrows (&[AgentEvent]) — no unnecessary cloning
latest_timestamp correctly returns a reference and uses iterator adapters without cloning
